title: Update Router::prune_neighbors_at, maintain, and related methods for Trickle-safe policy
description: Inject or use default TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy in prune_neighbors_at. Eviction only after policy confirmation AND >10s. Keep topology change detection and trickle.reset exactly as-is. Update maintain to pass policy. Ensure monotonic clock.
close_reason: Updated Router::prune_neighbors_at, maintain, prune_neighbors and NeighborTable::prune_with_removed to use TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy with default () impl. Eviction now requires policy confirmation AND age > 10s. Topology detection, trickle.reset, monotonic observe_now, and all tests preserved exactly. Updated all call sites and uses. Tests pass.
